briefings.title: Tuesday Briefing - March 24
briefings.content:
## Tuesday Briefing — March 24

**📧 Crushers email drops at noon today** — "Which Crushers hat are you? 🧢" goes out automatically to the list at 12:00 PM. No action needed.

**🏭 China factory specs expected today** — Boo was told to expect puffer jacket + hoodie sizing charts from the factory. When they arrive: size charts go on Shopify, wholesale catalog gets updated.

**🏄 Next surf shop outreach up** — Lawrencetown Surf Co (lawrencetownsurfco@gmail.com) and Rossignol Surf Shop (jeff@rossignolsurfshop.com or FB/IG DM). These are the next two in the Tuesday batch Ben was starting.

**👀 Two hot wholesale leads in play** — Kannon Beach (lookbook sent March 23) and Market Price Halifax (full pitch sent March 23). Both need a few days before follow-up — watch for replies in your inbox.

**🍺 3 brewery emails still waiting on Boo** — Propeller, Big Spruce, and Boxing Rock drafts were forwarded. Boo needs to send from his end when he's ready.

**📋 Faire marketplace setup pending** — Ben approved it Monday. Needs desktop to install the Shopify app. Can unlock a new wholesale buyer channel with zero outreach effort.

**📱 FB page access: add Boo** — Ben still needs to go Settings → People → Add New on the Apollo FB page to give Boo full access.

**⚠️ Accountant is urgent** — HST/GST registration exposure (been over $30k threshold since mid-2025). Finding an accountant before April is the move.

**📊 Pipeline sitting at 46 leads** — No action today unless something responds. Steady state.

---

### 🎯 Top 3 Priorities Today
1. **Boo: Send the 3 brewery emails** (Propeller, Big Spruce, Boxing Rock) + watch for factory specs
2. **Ben: Send next surf shop outreach** (Lawrencetown + Rossignol) + install Faire app on desktop
3. **Both: Start the accountant search** — one phone call to a local CA could get this off the urgent list
